projectDescription: A multitaper spectral estimation toolbox for EEG and time-series analysis, implemented in Python, MATLAB, and R.
keyFeatures: Multitaper spectral estimation using DPSS (Slepian) tapers
Implementations in Python, MATLAB, and R
Optional parallel/multiprocessing support in all languages
Configurable taper weighting: unity, eigenvalue, and adaptive
Sliding window spectrogram with configurable window size and step
Built-in plotting with dB-scaled colormap output
publicApiSurface: multitaper_spectrogram(data, fs, frequency_range, time_bandwidth, num_tapers, window_params, min_nfft, detrend_opt, multiprocess, n_jobs, weighting, plot_on, return_fig, clim_scale, verbose, xyflip) -> (mt_spectrogram, stimes, sfreqs) [Python]
multitaper_spectrogram(data, Fs, frequency_range, taper_params, window_params, min_NFFT, detrend_opt, weighting, plot_on, verbose) -> [spect, stimes, sfreqs] [MATLAB]
multitaper_spectrogram_mex(data, Fs, frequency_range, taper_params, window_params, min_NFFT, detrend_opt, weighting, plot_on, verbose) -> [spect, stimes, sfreqs] [MATLAB MEX]

multitaper_spectrogram_R(data, fs, frequency_range, time_bandwidth, num_tapers, window_params, min_nfft, weighting, detrend_opt, parallel, num_workers, plot_on, verbose, xyflip) -> list(spect, stimes, sfreqs) [R]
calc_mts_segment(data_segment, dpss_tapers, nfft, freq_inds, detrend_opt, num_tapers, dpss_eigen, weighting, wt) [Python internal]
